primaryGoal: help ops teams process orders and exceptions with low error rate

libraryRoute.reason: broad Vue admin coverage with tables, forms, and enterprise widgets
caveats: theme system should be aligned early

layoutDirection: fixed left nav, compact header controls, wide table workspace, contextual side panel
colorDirection: neutral light surfaces with restrained status colors
typographyDirection: system sans with small but legible data scale
motionDirection: minimal transitions and panel reveals only
acceptanceCriteria: operators can scan order state in under 15 seconds
critical exceptions remain visible above the fold
